title: NMR: Click the Terminal Methyl Signal
bodyText: The $^1H$ NMR spectrum contains an upfield terminal methyl triplet. Click the signal near $0.93\ ppm$.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show a 1H NMR spectrum for a simple primary alcohol with labeled aliphatic regions.

feedbacks: Correct: the terminal CH3 group appears upfield near 0.93 ppm.
Not quite. The terminal methyl group is the most upfield major signal, just below 1 ppm.
